context: Tests whether the agent implements the search API with correct disjunctive facet logic, separate price range handling, and a price range component that uses a dual-thumb range input committing only on mouseup/touchend with thumb clamping.

checklist.name: Products and facets together
checklist.description: The searchProducts function returns both products (hits) AND facet counts in a single response object — not as two separate calls

checklist.name: Disjunctive OR within facet
checklist.description: The facet filter builder groups values within the same facet key together as OR alternatives (e.g., [[brand:Nike, brand:Adidas], [color:black]]) rather than AND conditions

checklist.name: AND between facets
checklist.description: Filters from different facet keys are combined with AND logic (each facet group is a separate element in the filter array)

checklist.name: Price as numeric filter
checklist.description: Price min/max are applied as numeric comparison strings (e.g., 'price >= 50', 'price <= 150') NOT as facetFilters entries

checklist.name: Price excluded from facetFilters
checklist.description: price_min and price_max keys are excluded from the facetFilters array used for checkbox facets

checklist.name: Correct hits-per-page
checklist.description: The search query uses hitsPerPage of 24 (from the config constant or hardcoded as 24)

checklist.name: Dual-thumb range inputs
checklist.description: PriceRangeFacet renders two separate <input type='range'> elements (one for min, one for max), not a single range or checkboxes

checklist.name: Commit on mouseup/touchend
checklist.description: The price range component fires its callback (or commits the value) in onMouseUp and onTouchEnd handlers, NOT in onChange

checklist.name: Thumb clamping
checklist.description: The price range component clamps the min thumb's maximum to current max value and the max thumb's minimum to current min value to prevent the thumbs from crossing/overlapping

checklist.name: Design notes document
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md explains the OR-within AND-between facet logic, price range separate handling, and mouseup/touchend debounce strategy
